originalCode:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# Augment Extend — Central Install
# Copies repo → ~/.augment, init git, create settings.json

REPO_URL="https://github.com/phcngyn99/augment-extend"
TARGET="${HOME}/.augment"
TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)

echo "🚀 Augment Extend — Central Install"
echo "===================================="
echo

# ── 1. Backup prompt if ~/.augment exists ─────────────────────────────────────
if [ -d "$TARGET" ]; then
    echo "⚠️  ~/.augment exists"
    echo
    echo "[B]ackup — move to ~/.augment.backup-$TIMESTAMP"
    echo "[M]erge  — keep existing files, add new ones (git status after)"
    echo "[A]bort  — exit"
    echo
    read -p "Choose [B/M/A]: " -n 1 -r choice
    echo
    
    case "$choice" in
        [Bb])
            BACKUP="${TARGET}.backup-${TIMESTAMP}"
            echo "📦 Backing up to $BACKUP"
            mv "$TARGET" "$BACKUP"
            echo "   ✓ Backup complete"
            ;;
        [Mm])
            echo "🔀 Merge mode — copying only new files"
            cp -rn . "$TARGET" 2>/dev/null || true
            echo "   ✓ Files copied (existing files preserved)"
            echo
            echo "📊 Git status after merge:"
            cd "$TARGET"
            git status -s 2>/dev/null || echo "   (not a git repo yet)"
            echo
            echo "✅ Merge complete. Review changes above."
            echo "   Run: cd ~/.augment && git status"
            exit 0
            ;;
        [Aa]|*)
            echo "❌ Aborted"
            exit 0
            ;;
    esac
fi

# ── 2. Copy all files → ~/.augment ────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "📂 Copying files to ~/.augment"
mkdir -p "$TARGET"
cp -r . "$TARGET/"
echo "   ✓ Files copied"

# ── 3. Init git ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cd "$TARGET"
echo
echo "🔧 Initializing git"

if [ ! -d ".git" ]; then
    git init
    git remote add origin "$REPO_URL"
    git fetch --depth=1
    git branch -M main
    git reset --soft origin/main  # Track remote without overwriting files
    echo "   ✓ Git initialized"
else
    echo "   ℹ️  Git already initialized"
fi

# ── 4. Create settings.json from template ─────────────────────────────────────
SETTINGS_TEMPLATE="settings.json.template"
SETTINGS_FILE="settings.json"

if [ -f "$SETTINGS_FILE" ]; then
    echo
    echo "⚠️  settings.json exists — skipping creation"
else
    echo
    echo "📋 Creating settings.json from template"
    if [ -f "$SETTINGS_TEMPLATE" ]; then
        cp "$SETTINGS_TEMPLATE" "$SETTINGS_FILE"
        
        # Prompt for indexing dirs (optional)
        echo
        echo "📂 Configure indexing directories? (y/N)"
        read -p "> " -n 1 -r setup_dirs
        echo
        
        if [[ $setup_dirs =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
            echo "Enter paths, one per line. Empty line when done."
            DIRS=()
            while true; do
                read -p "Directory: " dir
                [ -z "$dir" ] && break
                dir="${dir/#\~/$HOME}"
                if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
                    DIRS+=("$dir")
                    echo "   ✓ $dir"
                else
                    echo "   ⚠️  Not found: $dir"
                fi
            done
            
            if [ ${#DIRS[@]} -gt 0 ]; then
                JSON_DIRS=$(printf ',"%s"' "${DIRS[@]}")
                JSON_DIRS="[${JSON_DIRS:1}]"
                python3 -c "
import json
with open('$SETTINGS_FILE', 'r') as f: s = json.load(f)
s['indexingAllowDirs'] = json.loads('$JSON_DIRS')
with open('$SETTINGS_FILE', 'w') as f: json.dump(s, f, indent=2)
"
                echo "   ✓ ${#DIRS[@]} directories configured"
            fi
        else
            echo "   Skipped — edit settings.json manually later"
        fi
        
        echo "   ✓ settings.json created"
    else
        echo "   ⚠️  Template not found — create settings.json manually"
    fi
fi

# ── 5. Fix permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo
echo "🔐 Setting permissions"
find . -type f \( -name "*.sh" -o -name "*.mjs" \) -exec chmod +x {} \;
echo "   ✓ Scripts executable"

# ── 6. Verify ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo
echo "✅ Installation complete!"
echo
echo "📊 Verification:"
echo "   Rules:  $(ls rules/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)"
echo "   Skills: $(find skills -name 'SKILL.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)"
echo "   Agents: $(find agents -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)"
echo

# ── 7. Next steps ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
echo "📝 Next steps:"
echo "   1. Delete staging clone:"
echo "      rm -rf ~/Downloads/augment-extend"
echo
echo "   2. Review settings:"
echo "      cat ~/.augment/settings.json"
echo
echo "   3. Clone marketplace plugins (optional):"
echo "      mkdir -p ~/.augment/plugins/marketplaces && cd \$_"
echo "      git clone https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git superpowers-dev"
echo "      git clone https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code.git"
echo "      git clone https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill.git"
echo "      git clone https://github.com/JuliusBrussee/caveman.git"
echo
echo "   4. Install CodeGraph (optional but recommended):"
echo "      sudo npm install -g @colbymchenry/codegraph"
echo "      cd ~/.augment && codegraph init -i"
echo
echo "   5. Updates:"
echo "      cd ~/.augment && git pull"
echo
